justification: Sidebar avatar uses brand-500 background with white initials. Contrast ratio slightly under WCAG AA 4.5:1. Decorative — user's name and email next to the avatar provide the primary affordance. Revisit at next branding refresh.
BoardPage footer stats (item count) use text-gray-400 on white. Ambient stat, not primary content. Fix requires designer-approved palette bump.
BoardPage footer stats (group count) — same pattern as span:nth-child(1). Scoped together for design refresh.
BoardPage footer stats (column count) — same pattern as span:nth-child(1).

BoardPage view-mode toggle (Table / Kanban) inactive state uses text-gray-500 on bg-gray-100. Contrast ~4.4:1, just under AA 4.5:1. Active state has stronger contrast. Tracked with the same design-refresh ticket.
